steps.title: Identify the rhetorical goal
steps.content: To “emphasize a difference” requires comparing both organisms directly. The notes provide the key contrast: Vulpes zerda has 64 chromosomes while Sterkiella histriomuscorum has over 15,000.

steps.title: Match the goal to the choices
steps.content: Choice A directly compares both organisms and highlights the difference using specific numbers plus “far more than.” The other three fail the goal: B and D address only one organism, and C emphasizes shared traits instead of differences. That matches choice A — A is correct.
